digest_text:
This week, Pakistani developers have been hard at work, pushing a wide range of exciting projects to GitHub. In the realm of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, several developers have shared their personal projects and learning journeys. For instance, Mirza Yasir Abdullah Baig has created a personal space to document his learnings in AI, ML, and Python programming, while Asadullah Shehbaz has built a chatbot application with LLM capabilities. Meanwhile, Toheed Asghar's NL2SQL project converts natural language questions into validated SQL queries using parallel discovery, generation, and validation agents.

On the web development front, several developers have shared their takes on to-do apps, with Zaheer Ahmedkhan's todo-app and ahmmikun's React-ToDo-List being notable examples. Hasnain Types has also been busy, pushing multiple projects including a modern SaaS platform for intelligent feedback collection, a weather forecasting app, and a travel and adventure landing page built with Next.js and React.

In the area of DevOps and software engineering, xraffay-dev's secure-ci-cd-pipeline project stands out, featuring a DevSecOps pipeline with GitHub Actions, matrix testing, and multi-stage Docker builds. Additionally, talhahakeem's C-Sharp.NET-Core-Repository-Pattern project demonstrates a clean and scalable implementation of the Repository Pattern in ASP.NET Core.

Other notable projects include Abdullah-Zafarr's Attendance_Cheat_Code, which listens to Zoom/Meet audio and alarms when the user's name is called, and Sufi Inam ul Hassan's FitAI, a fully functional Android fitness app and home-workout tracker. With such a diverse range of projects, it's clear that Pakistan's open source developer community is thriving and pushing the boundaries of innovation.

repos.name: MirzaYasirAbdullahBaig07
repos.description: This repository is my personal space to document and share everything I learn as I dive deeper into the world of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Python programming.

repos.name: LeetCode-75
repos.description: This repository contains my solutions to the LeetCode 75 curated problem list. The goal of this challenge is to build strong fundamentals in Data Structures & Algorithms commonly asked in technical interviews.

repos.name: LeetCode-Solutions
repos.description: This repository is a collection of LeetCode Problem Solutions for the beginners.

repos.name: SoftwareEnginering
repos.description: Software Engineering

repos.name: ahmmikun
repos.description: Config files for my GitHub profile.

repos.name: VidMind-AI-Powered-YouTube-Video-Q-A
repos.description: This is chatbot application that includes chat features and document reader with LLM

repos.name: todo-app
repos.description: A simple to-do app.

repos.name: corvit-web-dev-assignment
repos.description: Include all Html and Css assignment

repos.name: react-counter-app
repos.description: A counter that stops on 5

repos.name: React-ToDo-List
repos.description: A simple react todo list

repos.name: clarity-saas
repos.description: A modern SaaS platform for intelligent feedback collection with AI-powered processing, multi-language support, and advanced analytics. Built with Next.js 14 and TypeScript.

repos.name: forecast-pro
repos.description: Minimal weather at a glance  today compared to yesterday.

repos.name: hilink-ui
repos.description: Modern responsive travel & adventure landing page built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.

repos.name: trackit-app
repos.description: TrackIt is an AI-powered personal and group finance manager built on the T3 stack. Track expenses, manage budgets, split bills, and get smart insights with real-time sync, secure auth, and Stripe integration.

repos.name: vaulta-sdk
repos.description: TypeScript SDK for uploading files to the Vaulta API. Supports Node.js, Next.js, and browser environments. Simple, secure, and fast file storage integration for your apps.

repos.name: mollie_recurring_payments
repos.description: New Module to Support Mollie's Official Module to Enable Recurring Payments.

repos.name: Attendance_Cheat_Code
repos.description: Built because online classes are unwatchable but attendance still matters. Listens to your Zoom/Meet audio and alarms you when your name gets called.

repos.name: FitAI
repos.description: A fully functional Android Fitness App and Home-Workout Tracker featuring a real-time Admin CMS, dynamic exercise execution timers, and Cloud Firestore synchronization. Built natively in Java.

repos.name: secure-ci-cd-pipeline
repos.description: DevSecOps pipeline with GitHub Actions featuring matrix testing, Trivy CVE scanning, CodeQL SAST, multi-stage Docker builds, GHCR registry, tag-gated prod deploys to Render & Slack failure alerting.

repos.name: islam_nursey_farm
repos.description: Islam Nursery Farm ERP

repos.name: alibro005
repos.description: Config files for my GitHub profile.

repos.name: CS_Concepts_Zone
repos.description: A place where CS students and self-taught devs write about the things that actually helped them — DSA patterns, OS concepts, DBMS internals, Networks, and interview questions explained like a human being wrote them.

repos.name: Leetcode-Problems
repos.description: Why are you like this?

repos.name: customer-support-chatbot
repos.description: Customer Support Chatbot Platform

repos.name: agentfactory
repos.description: Build Digital FTEs that work 24/7. Your domain expertise—whether in sales, legal, finance, or healthcare—becomes an autonomous AI agent that never sleeps.

repos.name: NL2SQL
repos.description: Multi-agent NL→SQL pipeline built on LangGraph. Converts natural language questions into validated SQL queries using parallel discovery, generation, and validation agents. Supports multi-model mixing (GPT-4o + Gemini) via OpenRouter. Tested on Spider dataset.

repos.name: 100-days-of-cpp
repos.description: A 100-day coding challenge documenting daily C++ programs covering  OOP, data structures, algorithms, and mathematics. Each day includes  a clean, well-commented implementation. By Abdullah— Data  Science student at FAST NUCES, Lahore.

repos.name: variational-autoencoder
repos.description: This repository contains the implementation of VAEs from scratch in pytorch trained on CelebA dataset.

repos.name: gemini-cli
repos.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

repos.name: abdullahdarofficial
repos.description: I'm an AI Engineer specializing in building production-grade intelligent systems. I design and deploy LLM applications, RAG pipelines, AI agents, and recommendation engines that transform data into scalable, real-world solutions.

repos.name: C-Sharp.NET-Core-Repository-Pattern
repos.description: A clean and scalable implementation of the Repository Pattern in ASP.NET Core. Demonstrates Decoupling, Dependency Injection, and Unit of Work for efficient data access.

repos.name: fory
repos.description: A blazingly fast multi-language serialization framework powered by JIT and zero-copy.

repos.name: -DataForge-ML-Studio
repos.description: DataForge ML Studio is an advanced machine learning platform designed for data scientists and developers to build, train, and deploy predictive models seamlessly. With an intuitive interface and powerful tools, it simplifies the process of transforming raw data into actionable insights.

repos.name: hrms
repos.description: personal

repos.name: ali-bot
repos.description: A personal AI chatbot modeled after Muhammad Ali (me) from Lahore, Pakistan. Built with Astro + Groq (Llama 3.3 70B).

repos.name: HypoSnitch
repos.description: 🔬 HypoSnitch — Interactive binomial hypothesis testing app. Input your claim, sample size, and observed value to get step-by-step results: null distribution, p-value, and a plain-English verdict.

repos.name: Mehngai-Monitor
repos.description: Mehngai Monitor automates Lahore daily market price tracking by scraping official rate-list images, extracting clean data with OCR, and serving fast analytics for fruits, vegetables, and poultry.

repos.name: ml-journal
repos.description: Personal notes, experiments, and reflections on machine learning and AI.

repos.name: ml-sandbox
repos.description: A personal sandbox for practicing Machine Learning workflows. Contains end-to-end data preprocessing pipelines, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and foundational model training.

repos.name: pakdev-index
repos.description: The definitive index of Pakistani open source developers. Auto-updated daily via GitHub Actions.
